titleStmt.title: SII 19.139: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 139. (A.R. No. 259 of 1923.) KŌYIL-TĒVARĀYANPĒṬṬAI (NEAR PAṄḌĀRAVĀḌAI), PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MATSYAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This gives the extent and boundaries of three pieces of land (including one given in exchange for a flower-garden) which were endowed after purchase from several persons, by one Tiruvaḍigaḷ Aiyanaḍi of Śiṟuvēlūr in Iḷaiyūr-nāḍu on the southern bank of the river, for the maintenance of a perpetual lamp, and for offerings during the morning and mid-day services in the temple of Tiruchchēlūr-Mahādēva at Rājakēsari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. The mention of the village called after Vīranārāyaṇa (Parāntaka I) and the reference to a previous gift made in the 8th year of Rājakēsarivarman (evidently Gaṇḍarāditya) makes the record assignable to the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam śrīrājakesaricaturvetimaṅgalattu
tiruccelūr mahādevarkku vecālippāṭit teṉkarai Iḷaiyūrnāṭṭuc ciṟuvelūrc ciṟu velūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvaṭikaḷ Aiyyaṉaṭi
tirunontāviḷakku [ 1- ṟu] kku cantirātittavaṟ nittam Uriy Eṇṇaikkum ciṟukālaittiruvamutu nānāḻiyaricikkum Uccampotu nānāḻikkum neyyamutukkum ta
yiramutum kaṟiyamutum Aṭaikkāyamutukkumāka Ivvirājakesariccaturvedimaṅkalattu maṉoramac ceri Aruvalattu vārakkiyaṉ Ī
śvaraṉ centaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Īśvaraṉ nakkaṉum Icceri Ātaṉūr pālāciriyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ tattaṉum Ivaṉ tampi nārā
yaṇaṉ kāṭaṉum marutūr pālāciriyaṉ tāyaṉ kaāḷiyum Ivvaṉaivarpakkalum nāṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam kāmatevavati
kkuk kiḻakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu maṉoramavāykkālukku vaṭakku mutalcatirattu Īśvaraṉ centaṉ tattapirāṉbhaṭṭarpakka
lum Ivvaṉaivarpakkalumāka vilai �4vum kovirājakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 8 vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrī viranārāyaṇaccaturvetimaṅka
lattu cūracūḷāmaṇicceri Aruvalattu vārakkiyaṉ Ātittaṉ sūryaṉṉiṭai vilaikoṇ ṭuṭaiya nilam �4yumāka Iccatiram �vum Itu tiruva
ṭikaḷ(ṭi) Aiyyaṉaṭiye vacca tirunantavāṉam tiruppaḷḷittāmattukkut tirumañcuṇavaḻi
kku merkkum peruvaḻikkut teṟkum nārāyaṇaṉ kāṭaṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum śrīrvva- tattiṉ nilat
tukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam pūntavāṉan teṟkaṭaiyak kiṇaṟuṭpaṭa nāṉmāvukkum nāṉ pariva
rttaṉaiyāl kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivūr naratoṅkavatikku merkkum Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu cikaṇṭa vāykkālukku teṟku 1— catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiñca muṟṟumāvi
l meṟkaṭaiya nān Iṭaiyāṟṟukkuṭi cāvānti tattanārāyaṇanpakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam ṅa4yum māhāsabhaiyārum panmāheśvararum rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.139 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
